---
title: "get_trade_history"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_trade_history()`

Get Trade History

## Usage

```r
get_trade_history(
  ticker = NULL,
  min_ts = NULL,
  max_ts = NULL,
  limit = 1000,
  max_pages = 10,
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `ticker` | Character. Filter by market ticker. Optional. |
| `min_ts` | Integer. Minimum timestamp (Unix ms). |
| `max_ts` | Integer. Maximum timestamp (Unix ms). |
| `limit` | Integer. Results per page (1-1000). Defaults to 1000. |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum pages to fetch. Defaults to 10. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with trade information.

## Description

Retrieves all historical trades for a market or across all markets.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Get all trades for a market
trades <- get_trade_history(ticker = "KXHIGHNY-25FEB08-B54")

# Get recent trades across all markets
trades <- get_trade_history(max_pages = 5)

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other history: 
`get_event_candlesticks()`,
`get_event_results()`,
`get_market_history()`,
`get_series_history()`,
`get_settled_events()`,
`get_settled_markets()`
